---
title: "3.1.1 - Advanced - Linear Differencing Models I"
description: "This note introducing difference-in-difference style models, particularly for causal models and inference."
categories: [advanced, R, difference in differences, t-test, comparison measure estimator, before-after estimator, regression, triple difference estimator, cross-section data, parallel trends]
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=advanced_difference_in_differences.html">

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here](advanced_difference_in_differences.html).
